ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income of the customer */,
  "became_member_on" TEXT /* Date the customer became a member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "kids" INTEGER /* Number of children the customer has */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "preferred_channel" TEXT /* Preferred communication channel of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "offer_type" TEXT /* Type of offer (e.g., BOGO, discount, informational) */,
  "difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the offer */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the offer */,
  "reward" INTEGER /* Reward for completing the offer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the offer */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the offer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the offer */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the offer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the offer (e.g., active, expired, upcoming) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offer associated with the transaction */,
  "day_num" INTEGER /* Day number of the transaction */,
  "daily_amt_spent" REAL /* Daily amount spent by the customer */,
  "num_trans" INTEGER /* Number of transactions made by the customer */,
  "amt_spent_per_trans" REAL /* Amount spent per transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product(s) purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product(s) purchased */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_offer_id FOREIGN KEY ("offer_id") REFERENCES offers ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offer_redemptions" (
  "redemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each redemption */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who redeemed the offer */,
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offer redeemed */,
  "has_profit" INTEGER /* Whether the offer redemption resulted in profit */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit from the offer redemption */,
  "redemption_date" TEXT /* Date of the offer redemption */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the offer was redeemed */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product(s) for which the offer was redeemed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product(s) for which the offer was redeemed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("redemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offer_redemptions_offer_id FOREIGN KEY ("offer_id") REFERENCES offers ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offer_redemptions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the channel */,
  "email" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has an email channel */,
  "mobile" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has a mobile channel */,
  "social" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has a social media channel */,
  "web" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has a web channel */,
  "preferred_channel" TEXT /* Preferred communication channel of the customer */,
  "last_engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the last engagement through each channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channels_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_variables" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target variable */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the target variable */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Target variable value */,
  "quadrant" INTEGER /* Quadrant value */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Description of the target variable */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Date when the target variable was set or updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_variables_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
